prompt: Edit image 1 (MRI of fetus) by using the grayscale gradient from image 2 to guide the overall tone mapping and contrast, and incorporating the distinctive grainy texture and visual characteristics of the ultrasound image from image 3 into the fetal representation, creating a hybrid medical imaging style.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1 (MRI of fetus) by precisely adjusting its overall tone mapping and contrast according to the horizontal grayscale gradient present in image 2 (transitioning from white on the left to black on the right). Simultaneously, apply the distinctive grainy texture, speckle noise, and visual characteristics of the ultrasound image from image 3 specifically onto the fetal representation within image 1. The aim is to create a single image with a hybrid medical imaging style, combining the structural detail of the MRI with the tonal range of image 2 and the textural qualities of the ultrasound.
